title: rabelera holostea
side_effects: Rabelera holostea can have side effects if used improperly, such as stomach discomfort, nausea, and diarrhea due to its high concentration of certain alkaloids. Prolonged use can also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals. In rare cases, improper use of the plant may cause more severe reactions, including allergic contact dermatitis and anaphylaxis, which require immediate medical attention. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Rabelera holostea to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
